## [PPC Competitor Research](https://www.spyfu.com/ppc/overview)

### Search for a competitor. See every keyword they've ever bought on Google and every ad test they've run. Make their successes your own and avoid their mistakes.

[![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)\\
**Google Ads Competitor Keyword Spy Tool** \\
\\
Search for a competitor. Download their PPC keywords. It's that simple. No download limits. See how many clicks they get and how much they pay for each keyword.](https://www.spyfu.com/ppc/keywords) [![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)\\
**Monitor PPC Competitors** \\
\\
Keep track of every domain bidding on your Google Ads. Catch changes in ad spend over time. Watch out for emerging competitors and shifts in strategy.](https://www.spyfu.com/ppc/competitors) [![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)\\
**Find Competitors' Keywords you Don't Already Buy** \\
\\
Type in your domain, and we'll show you the core keywords that your top Google Ads competitors buy but you don't.](https://www.spyfu.com/ppc/kombat) [![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)\\
**Google Ads Advisor - Our Best Google Ads Keyword Research** \\
\\
Enter YOUR website. We analyze all your competitors' Google Ads bidding history and recommend the most profitable keywords you're not already buying.](https://www.spyfu.com/ppc/adwords-advisor) [![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)\\
**Competitor Google Ads Campaign and Ad Test History** \\
\\
Browse your competitor's complete Google Ads campaign history. See the results of every ad split test they've ever run and the early keywords that didn't work out.](https://www.spyfu.com/ppc/ad-history) [![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)\\
**PPC Negative Match Recommendations** \\
\\
Wasting money on Google Ads? Scan your account for costly overly-broad keyword matches that your competitors already tried and failed.](https://www.spyfu.com/recon) [![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)\\
**PPC Ad Rank Tracker** \\
\\
Track your ranking progress and impression share on your most important keyword groups. We'll suggest expansion keywords and actions to take. Try it free.](https://www.spyfu.com/rank-tracking)

## [SEO Competitor Research](https://www.spyfu.com/seo/overview)

### Search for a competitor. See every keyword they rank on. Uncover the exact content and backlinks that lets them outrank you.

[![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)\\
**Research Competitors SEO Keywords** \\
\\
Search for a competitor. Download their SEO keywords. It's that simple. See what they rank on and how many clicks they get.](https://www.spyfu.com/seo/keywords) [![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)\\
**Spy on Your SEO Competition** \\
\\
Keep track of every website in your SEO niche. Catch changes in rankings and content over time. Watch out for emerging competitors.](https://www.spyfu.com/seo/competitors) [![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)\\
**Multi-Competitor Keyword Tool** \\
\\
Type in your domain to get instant insight into the most important keywords you aren't ranking for, but your competitors are.](https://www.spyfu.com/seo/kombat) [![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)\\
**Complete Keyword Ranking History** \\
\\
Trace the ranking history of any page or website on a keyword. Discover the algorithm change or site optimization that caused their rise or fall.](https://www.spyfu.com/seo/ranking-history) [![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)\\
**Custom Branded SEO Client Reports** \\
\\
Custom branded SEO reports designed to land and retain clients. Prove your value > Highlight opportunities > Show competitor action.](https://www.spyfu.com/seo/reports) [![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)\\
**Check Competitor Backlinks by Keyword** \\
\\
Find out which backlinks do your competitors have that you don't. See the exact links that let them outrank you on a specific keyword.](https://www.spyfu.com/seo/backlinks) [![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)\\
**Influencer Marketing - Social Outreach for Backlinks** \\
\\
Target the influencers whose links will help you rank on a specific keyword with a custom audience on Facebook or Twitter. Or build a relationship directly.](https://www.spyfu.com/backlinks/backlinks-outreach) [![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)\\
**Track your SEO Keyword Rankings** \\
\\
Track your ranking progress and impression share on your most important keyword groups. We'll suggest expansion keywords and actions to take.](https://www.spyfu.com/rank-tracking)

## [Keyword Research Tools](https://www.spyfu.com/keyword/overview)

### Search for a competitor. See every keyword they've ever bought on Google and every ad test they've run. Make their successes your own and avoid their mistakes.

[![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)\\
**Google Keyword Tool Alternative** \\
\\
Generate targeted keyword ideas. Filter by search volume, cpc, SEO difficulty, number of advertisers, click-through rate, more.](https://www.spyfu.com/keyword/related-keywords) [![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)\\
**Keyword Groups and Bulk Upload** \\
\\
Paste in a list of keywords and we'll organize them into groups and add search volume and CPC data to them.](https://www.spyfu.com/keyword/bulk-upload) [![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)\\
**PPC Ad Test Winners and Losers** \\
\\
Learn the secret tricks of the most successful advertisers for any keyword. See the results of every ad test ever run. Take the successes, avoid the mistakes.](https://www.spyfu.com/keyword/ad-history) [![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)\\
**Google Ads Keyword Advice for Your Campaign** \\
\\
Type in a keyword, see the most profitable keywords in that niche. It's that simple. Everything we know about competitor-driven Google Ads research in one click.](https://www.spyfu.com/keyword/adwords-advisor) [![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)\\
**Quality Backlinks for Specific Keywords** \\
\\
Enter a keyword and see the sites and backlinks that help you rank on that keyword. SpyFu backlink recommendations are 100% safe and actively indexed by Google.](https://www.spyfu.com/keyword/backlinks) [![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)\\
**PPC and SEO SERP Analysis** \\
\\
Big lessons in deep SERP analysis: Find specific ranking factors for each keyword. Uncover the weak sites that manage to rank anyway and learn their secret.](https://www.spyfu.com/keyword/serp-analysis) [![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)\\
**SEO Keyword Ranking History** \\
\\
Trace the ranking history of any page or website on a keyword. Discover the algorithm change or site optimization that caused their rise or fall.](https://www.spyfu.com/keyword/ranking-history)

## Domain Leads and Top Lists

### Create your own custom list of domains. Filter by industry, location, ad spend, search traffic, social media, and technologies.

[![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)\\
**Top Websites by Google Ads Spend and Search Traffic** \\
\\
We sorted 50 million+ websites into lists like Top Advertisers by State and City. Drill in by SEO traffic, social media and more.](https://www.spyfu.com/outreach/domain-top-lists) [![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)\\
**Highest CPC and Most Searched Keywords** \\
\\
Our keyword metrics come directly from Google Keyword Planner and we created lists of the highest CPC and search volume keywords.](https://www.spyfu.com/outreach/keyword-top-lists)

## Step-by-Step Guides

### We wrote these guides to walk you through using SpyFu (and other tools) to get things done. Follow these workflows, and you will be successful.

[**Find the Keywords Most Important in Your Market** \\
\\
1. Discover core niche keywords.\\
2. Organize them into concepts.\\
3. Expand the groups.\\
4. More...](https://www.spyfu.com/blog/find-important-keywords-market/) [**Increase Your Rank on Specific Keywords** \\
\\
1. Research keywords to focus on.\\
2. Set a baseline.\\
3. On-page technical audit.\\
4. More...](https://www.spyfu.com/blog/moving-page-specific-keywords/) [**Starting a New Google Ads Campaign** \\
\\
1. Get a Google Ads account up and running the right way.\\
2. Find the most sure-win keywords.\\
3. Start with winning ad copy.\\
4. More...](https://www.spyfu.com/blog/google-ads-tutorial/) [**Researching Your Competitor's Marketing Strategy** \\
\\
1. Search for your competitor's domain.\\
2. Search for your domain.\\
3. Dig deeper and look at history.\\
4. More...](https://www.spyfu.com/blog/tutorial-researching-competitors-marketing-strategy/) [**Planning a Content Marketing Campaign** \\
\\
1. Don’t shoot for perfect.\\
2. Understand your goals.\\
3. Set a baseline.\\
4. More...](https://www.spyfu.com/blog/tutorial-planning-content-marketing-campaign/) [**Use Keyword Tools in Your Research** \\
\\
1. Understand 3rd party tools vs Google's keyword tool\\
2. Learn how to use keyword tool for research\\
3. Review top keyword tools available\\
4. More...](https://www.spyfu.com/blog/keyword-tools-search-marketing-strategy/)

## Plus a Library of over 200 Video Tutorials

### We cover everything from a [Full Tour](http://help.spyfu.com/en/collections/1783808-spyfew-videos-mini-tutorials) of every aspect of SpyFu to our super laid-back [cancellation and refund policy.](http://help.spyfu.com/en/articles/2968627-how-does-the-30-day-money-back-guarantee-work)

[View Library](http://help.spyfu.com/en/collections/1783808-spyfew-videos-mini-tutorials)

web.title: Free Keyword Research Tool from Wordtracker
web.description: The best FREE alternative to the Keyword Planner. Use Wordtracker to reveal 1000s of profitable longtail keywords with up to 10000 results per search.
web.markdown:
# Find new keywords for your market

Enter a keyword or a domain Search

Need more than a **keyword research tool**? How about a **market research tool**. Take **competitors' keywords**, in-depth **PPC** and **SEO** insights, data from **Google** and our own proprietary search technology... **All you need to do is start searching.**

![Wordtracker tool screengrab](https://www.wordtracker.com/public-assets/large-tool-grab-5.4c77c4.jpg)

## Wordtracker vs Google Keyword Planner

### The Google keyword research tool is the 'Keyword Planner'. It's designed for Adwords and not SEO, so competition and other metrics are given only for paid search. Numbers are scaled from a sample, and similar keywords are grouped together. Instead, **use a tool built for keyword research**.

- Actual (not grouped) keywords
- Actual (not banded) results
- Search trends
- SEO competition metrics
- SERP comparison
- Live chat customer service
- Related/lateral search
- Find competitors' keywords
- Negative keyword search

- Wordtracker
- Yes
- Yes
- Yes
- Yes
- Yes
- Yes
- Yes
- Yes
- Yes

- Google
- No
- No
- Yes
- No
- No
- No
- No
- No
- No

Our own proprietary data and toolset means you can get **10,000 keywords** per search as well as related keywords, so your pages can be optimised more effectively to outrank the competition.

### Related terms

Find related keywords for any seed. Use it to write stronger content that ranks better and drives more traffic to your domain.

### SERP preview

See the search results and the difficulty of beating the competition for any keyword, right in the tool

### Find Competitors' Keywords

Our Domain tool allows you to find the keywords driving traffic to any domain. See rank, clicks and more.

## The market leader for over a decade

![](https://www.wordtracker.com/public-assets/headshot-john-jantsch.0c819c.png)

### John JantschDuct Tape Marketing

> If you want more traffic to your site or want to better understand what your market is looking for you should explore Wordtracker.

![](https://www.wordtracker.com/public-assets/headshot-danny-sullivan.98e8e3.png)

### Danny SullivanSearch Engine Land

> If you are serious about SEO Wordtracker is an essential investment, a must-have resource for any marketing professional.

![](https://www.wordtracker.com/public-assets/headshot-ian-spencer.1e8b37.png)

### Ian SpencerClearweb

> We found keywords for clients that no one is currently competing on, which is pretty cool... It is well worth the money.

## Get started now

Sign up now

From **$27** per monthFull **chat and email support**

web.title: Website Word Counter Tool - Accurate & Free - Searchbloom
web.description: Check any website's word count quickly and accurately with SearchBloom's free bulk web page Word Counter Tool. Enter the URLs you want to check today!
web.markdown:
Website Word Counter - Free URL Word Counter - Searchbloom® on Vimeo

## Bulk Word Count Checker

Enter URL's in the box below or upload a .csv file to begin

Enter Multiple URLs:(Enter one URL per line, maximum 20 URL's).

![](https://www.searchbloom.com/tools/bulk-web-page-word-count-checker/)

OR

Upload CSV: (Upload a list of URL's in .CSV format). [Sample.csv](https://www.searchbloom.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/03/sample-csv.csv)

No File Chosen

Perform Check


**3.** See Your Results

Export Into CSV

|     |     |     |     |     |     |     |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Result | Input URL | Word Count Total | Correct Word Count | Anchor Text Words | Anchor Percentage |
| {{index + 1}} | {{item.url}} | {{item.total}} | {{item.correct}} | {{item.a}} |  | {{item.aper}} |

What is a website word counter tool for?

You’ve heard the phrase, “Quality over quantity,” right?

Well, when it comes to maximizing all parts of SEO, **quality is just as important as quantity.**

You may already know that, over the years, Google’s search engine results have skewed in favor of high-value, actionable, and readable (by humans) content. So anyone who was using the old keyword-spam-and-jam technique to gain rankings had to re-think their SEO strategy fast.

In other words, quality content on webpages matters and Google rewards you for it! That’s as it should be.

However, quantity may matter just as much. Part of catapulting your website, blog post, or content to the first and second pages of Google’s search results is to ensure that the amount of copy you’re writing is competitive

Competitive with other top-performing, comparable pieces of content, that is.

So this website word counter tool totally simplifies this part of your research process. It’s designed to help you learn about the specific word count of the top 10-20 search URLs that are currently ranking for a specific keyword.

The right website word counter tool will run through each of these URLs and generate the word count of each. Searchbloom’s own Bulk Word Count Checker tool will also give you the average word count, so you have a clear limit of where to aim your website word count.

How To Use Our Bulk Word Count Checker

The Word Counter tool is pretty straightforward to use. You can just grab URLs and populate them one at a time, or you can use a .CSV file if you’re just an organization nut.

Here’s how you can use the word counter:

- Do a Google search for a keyword
- Open the first several search results (up to 20) in new tabs
- Grab the URLs of each and copy+paste each into the Website Word Counter tool — make sure to hit “Enter” after each entry so that there’s only one URL per line
- You can also upload a .CSV file with one link per cell in the spreadsheet
- Hit the “Perform Check” button and see the number of words there are
- You can then take a screenshot _or_ export the results data into a new CSV

It’s a fantastic idea to bookmark this simple but powerful word counter tool for later use. But pay attention to the insights you gain from each of the numbers.

Our Bulk Word Count Checker focuses on four metrics:

- The total number of words ( **Word Count Total**)
- The corrected word count (**which is Total Word Count minus any words that are wrapped in an <a> tag** )
- The total number of words wrapped in an <a> tag ( **Anchor Text Words**)
- The above number as a percentage of the total word count ( **Anchor Percentage**).

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201024%20405'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

In the example above, the URL in row one has a total word count of 9293 words on the page. For many cases, that may be all you are looking for and you can go one with your day. But this website word counter provides some additional context too. Of the 9293 words, 1036 of them are wrapped in an <a> tag and considered anchor text. That anchor text accounts for 11% of your total word count.  The difference between the “word count total” and the “anchor text words” is 8257 words, which is the “correct word count” number displayed.

Seeing how many words are on yours and/or your competitor’s websites, as well as information about anchor text can help provide valuable insights into your own SEO and content marketing strategies.

## Every online detail checked & analyzed

It goes to show that every site is different, we will help you make your mark.

[FREE ACTION PLAN](https://www.searchbloom.com/tools/bulk-web-page-word-count-checker/#)

### Frequently Asked Questions

What does the word counter do?

The word counter analyzes text by counting words, characters, sentences, paragraphs, and pages. It's ideal for ensuring your SEO content meets specific word count requirements.

How accurate is the word count?

The tool accurately counts words by identifying text separated by spaces, aligning with standard methods used in word processors, ensuring consistency.

Can it help with SEO keyword count?

Yes, it helps by providing precise word and character counts, allowing you to maintain optimal keyword density and text length within your SEO strategy.

Why should SEO writers use this tool?

SEO writers benefit from this tool as it ensures that content meets specified word counts, aiding in effective online content marketing and strategy.

Can I upload content files?

Yes, you can upload a variety of text files, as well as audio and video files for transcription, with a maximum file size of 100 MB.

Is this tool free for SEO writers?

Yes, the tool is available for free, providing all necessary features to aid SEO writers in analyzing and optimizing their content.

How do I start using the tool?

Simply paste your text into the input area or upload a file. Click Analyze to get metrics like word count, character count, and more.

Does it estimate content reading time?

Yes, it estimates reading time based on an average speed of 240 words per minute, helping SEO writers gauge how long users might spend on the page.

Can I track changes over time?

While the tool provides instant analysis upon submission, tracking changes over time would require manual logging of results or saving prior analyses.

Can it save my analysis results?

You can download results as a text file or save them to Evernote, ensuring easy access for future reference.

Does it offer real-time analysis?

No, the analysis runs after you submit the text. Real-time word counting isn't supported, ensuring full and accurate analysis of your submission.

Can I use it offline?

The basic text analysis requires an internet connection, especially for file uploads and transcription processes. Internet access is necessary for these functions.

Can I change the estimated reading speed?

No, the reading speed is fixed at 240 words per minute and speaking speed at 150 words per minute, based on typical adult averages.

Does it provide readability scores?

No, the tool focuses on counting metrics like words and characters. For advanced readability scores, other specialized tools would be necessary.

Does it check for plagiarism?

No, this tool does not check for plagiarism. It is focused on text counting and transcription, not content originality verification.
